prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2023年物理类最低位次稳定在约145名，2024年因大幅扩招（计划从3人增至15人）位次骤降至1162名，2025年继续扩招至21人但位次回升至844名，显示该 校在重庆的报考热度正在恢复，近两年位次波动较大；该校在重庆物理类招生计划：2021-2023年各3人，2024年15人，2025年21人，2026年22人。2026年 较2025年小幅扩招1人，扩幅约4.8%，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学（含上海医学院）为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名第5名，属全国顶尖高校层 次，医学学科实力位居全国前列；2026年声誉评价偏负面（涉及师德师风事件），但抖音热度排名第4（高热），短视频平台曝光量大；2025年声誉偏正面（科 研成果荣誉）。整体看，该校社会关注度极高，负面舆情对顶尖名校的报考热度影响有限；临床医学（A）、公共卫生与预防医学（A+）、护理学（A-）、药学 （A）、基础医学（A-）等，医学学科整体实力位居全国前列，对高分考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业持续高热推荐，社会报考热 度高；重庆市物理类考生2021年约9.9万人增至2025年约13.9万人，2026年总考生约20.9万人，按近年物理类占比约65.5%估算约13.7万人，与2025年基本持平；该校位于上海市，非重庆本地高校，在重庆招生人数较少（2026年仅22人），属于跨省优质生源竞争，受地域偏好影响较小。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综 合2025年位次回升趋势、2026年计划仅小幅扩招1人、考生规模基本持平、医学专业持续高热等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次在2025年844名基础上略有后移。预测最低位 次约888名，区间781-995名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（781-995名）内，建议以二档临床医学（卓越临床医师班）为主攻方向，一档八年制临床医学和口腔医学可作为冲刺，三档医学试验班作为保底选择。若位次明 显优于区间下限（如750名以内），可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2023, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was stable at around 145. In 2024, due to a significant expansion (enrollment plan increased from 3 to 15), the ranking dropped sharply to 1162. In 2025, with further expansion to 21, the ranking rebounded to 844, indicating a recovery in application popularity in Chongqing, though rankings have fluctuated greatly in recent two years. The enrollment plans for Physics Category in Chongqing: 3 each year from 2021 to 2023, 15 in 2024, 21 in 2025, and 22 in 2026. The 2026 plan shows a slight increase of 1 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 4.8%, which has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University (including Shanghai Medical College) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 5th in the Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top tier of national universities, with medical disciplines ranking among the top in the country. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving teacher ethics incidents), but it ranks 4th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms. In 2025, the reputation was relatively positive (research achievements and honors). Overall, the university has extremely high social attention, and negative public opinion has limited impact on the application popularity of top prestigious schools. Clinical Medicine (A), Public Health and Preventive Medicine (A+), Nursing (A-), Pharmacy (A), Basic Medicine (A-), etc., the overall strength of medical disciplines ranks among the top in the country, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to be highly recommended, with high social application heat. The number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing increased from about 99,000 in 2021 to about 139,000 in 2025. In 2026, the total number of candidates is about 209,000, estimated at about 137,000 for Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 65.5%, roughly the same as in 2025. The university is located in Shanghai, not a local Chongqing institution, with a small enrollment in Chongqing (only 22 in 2026), belonging to cross-provincial competition for high-quality students, with limited influence from regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound trend in 2025 rankings, the slight expansion of only 1 in the 2026 plan, the roughly stable candidate pool, and the sustained high popularity of medical majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly decrease from the 2025 ranking of 844. The predicted minimum ranking is about 888, with a range of 781-995.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (781-995), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Clinical Medicine (Outstanding Clinical Physician Class) as the main target, with Tier 1 Eight-Year Clinical Medicine and Stomatology as reach options, and Tier 3 Medical Experimental Class as a safety choice. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 750), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 top majors.
